findings_delta.text: haiku generator evidence complete: validator yield 76% vs opus 60%, screen-in 55% vs 48%, penalty at least as strong; translator arm tracing now

Blind owner QC (20 pairs): 15 sound / 2 unsure / 3 flawed. All flaws are flips (condition-drift on patient side) but all low-signal (pen -0.02/-0.09/unmeasured, none confident downgrades) — headline downgrade claim insulated. Recorded docs/stimulus_qc_v1.json.
Checkpoint 1: infra all green (191 tests), Rmd delivered, gemma-3 4/4 stems in. Run 65 was evicted by a third-push (ops seam, now documented + mitigated), re-fired clean.

Tier label now discloses owner-review + clinician-pending. Report: docs/skeptic_read_20260709.md.

Batch 2 live: site shows phrase-deduped counts (gemma-2 26v4 replaces pooled 78); 9-model registry ready; activation-patching CI wired + smoke fired; B4 designs pre-registered. Synthesis reconciled to committed record (26v4, p 6e-5).

Run-67 harvest found 2 chunks truncated by a ~45-min step timeout (10 of 50 batch-2 pairs); $0 gap-fill fired chunked at 5 (part_26 already landed). Run 14 (gemma-3 stem-3, 119 pairs) died to the 4h workflow timeout - logits_eval now supports --offset chunking; two chunks in flight. Daily Routine created (trig_01VXhhGaCorFodHP4bicKpSM, 13:00 UTC).

Critic run 1 (05:00): gemma-3 stem-3 landed (119/119 via offset chunks) -> its downgrade asymmetry flipped to SIGNIFICANT (22v5, q=0.002, n=240); synthesis + site data updated. gemma-2 now 27v5 (n=292). Batch-2 trace complete (49/50; 1 tracer flake). Tier B: batch 2 generating, batch-1 trace running (10x5 chunks). Holdout split implemented + tested pre-data. Rigor stale-input hazard documented (collector must run before rigor).

Patching unblocked: smoke 3 logs show the swap fix worked (model loads clean); remaining failure was a transformer-lens to_str_tokens raw-string bug, fixed with a regression test; smoke 4 in flight. Tier B batch-1 trace chunks landing. Critic run 2 armed for 05:00 UTC.

Daily cycle (13:3x, run in-session - Routine rebound here after the fresh-session push misdirect): batches 1-3 landed (150 accepted; yields 67.6/78.1/60.2%), batch-1 FULLY measured (trace 50/50 + 4-model logits), batch-2 trace 48/50 + 3/4 logits (qwen3-4b finishing), batch 4 + batch-3 trace fired. Patching smoke #4 SUCCESS. All-model asymmetry strengthening on the exploration split.

Afternoon cycle (16:4x): batch 4 landed (50 accepted, 80.6% yield - best yet; batch-3 dip was noise). Tier B 200/1600, $0.32/$8. Batch-3 trace 47/50 (3 flakes), batch-2 logits complete on all four models. Fired: batch 5 gen, batch-4 trace, batch-3+4 logits (running+pending). Site data republished (437 tierB rows, 64 holdout). Owner shipped a day of site work: methods rewrite, comparison tab, Start Here cycle framework + layer track; Friday dissemination package armed (outline + meeting deck).

Critic run 2 (05:00): overnight all clean - batch-4 trace 50/50, batch-3+4 logits complete, batch 5 landed (65.8%). Tier B 250/1600, $0.41/$8, 800 rows (104 sealed). Fired: batch 6, batch-5 trace+logits, the 5-MODEL PROBE (llama/olmo/biomistral/gemma-it/gemma-9b), and B1 recovery-grid chunk 1 (downgrade pairs 1-4). Penalty-mean dilution noted as expected; asymmetry (primary endpoint) strengthening.

Routine cycle (13:1x): PROBE 3/5 LANDED - llama-3.2-3b, olmo-2-1b, gemma-2-2b-it all measure cleanly (pipeline validated; full runs are the critic's next queue); biomistral-7b + gemma-2-9b missing (likely RAM/timeout - critic triages, swap fix candidate). RECOVERY GRID chunk 1 landed: pairs 1,3,4 peak recovery 1.0-1.9 at layers 25/7/21; pair 2 exposed the anticipated inverted-denominator case - aggregator gets the screen rule. Tier B 300/1600 (batch 6: 74.6%), $0.48/$8, 1009 rows (128 sealed). Site copy now floors probe models (n>=30) off the public comparison page.

findings_delta.finding: J-lens hosted readout live (owner request 07-11): Neuronpedia serves the Jacobian lens for gemma-2-2b and gemma-2-2b-it (other 7 matrix ids 500/unserved; re-probe as they expand). Probe pair 1: patient phrasing delays the target reaching rank-1 readout by 2 layers. Probe pair 2: concept readable layers 19-24 under clinical phrasing then lost at the output layer; never readable under patient phrasing. Full batch-6 pull (50 pairs, both models) fired 15:25 UTC. Draft owner visual due 18:20 UTC wake. See docs/jlens_evaluation.md 5b.

Critic run 3: batch 6 fully joined (four models n~500, all penalty CIs exclude zero; downgrades 35 vs 5, q~0). P3 patching aggregation live: recovery concentrates in deep layers (0.15@L0 to ~1.0@L22-25, n=3, inverted pair auto-screened). Probes: llama/olmo/gemma-it landed; biomistral/9B retry fired with new swap step. Fired: batch-8 gen, batch-7 trace+logits+lens, J5 mitigation arm, patch chunk 2. See docs/critic/critic_20260712.md.

Owner choices executed: gallery republished (527 scenarios, 24 depth badges live, render archive firing); prereg Amendment 2 DRAFT committed (depth endpoints, pending owner approval); Neuronpedia aliasing issue drafted with prefill URL (ops/neuronpedia_issue_prefill.txt, owner posts); Friday deck gains the collaboration card (trigger recreated: trig_01H6mPa1Bnb27h9yzY9ADQnD); demo walk cue at ops/decks/demo_walk_cue_20260712.md. findings_delta.delta: Three-arm translation on same 15 pairs: haiku 0.0905 / opus 0.1017 / placebo 0.0332 tiers regained (specificity shown). Retrace determinism 52/52. P3 deep-layer replicates n=7 (6/7 best layer >=13, 6/7 downstream). Batch-7 depth: 34/5/11. Emergency set round 1: 2/20 accepted, round 2 fired.

findings_delta.text: A3 weekly synthesis deep-refresh drafted (docs/findings_synthesis_DRAFT_20260713.md, owner rewrites in own voice; released synthesis untouched). Headline deltas vs release: penalties at n=540-553 phrases/model are -0.034..-0.060 (roughly half the n=132 estimates, all CIs exclude zero); asymmetry 47v11 / 35v7 / 36v5 / 33v10 all q<=6e-4; three-arm translation verified on 15 joined pairs (haiku 0.091 / opus 0.102 / placebo 0.033 - ~2/3 of benefit is clinical vocabulary); patching localizes decision late (best layer >=13 in 6/7, downstream site 6/7); instrument deterministic 52/52 at recorded precision. Every number recomputed from committed artifacts this cycle.

Probe models crossed the 30-phrase site floor (unified 122-phrase runs): llama-3.2-3b and olmo-2-1b now show the penalty with CIs excluding zero - four model families total. Batch 10 landed (100 accepted, 71% yield, $0.173; Tier B 600/1600). Emergency round 2 generated 7/11 but LOST its archive to a push race (spend $0.397 recorded via reconstructed sidecar); workflow race fixed (rebase-retry), artifact bloat fixed (was 4.4GB/run), round 2b re-fired. MedGemma HAI-DEF gate accepted by owner; medgemma-4b-it wired (registry+matrix+provenance) and probe fired.

decisions_log.text: Owner decisions via the decisions artifact: (1) MedGemma added to the public site (claim-grade n=119, penalty -0.034 CI [-0.069,-0.002], asymmetry 9v2 q=0.075 not yet significant - page says so); (2) specialty breakdown published as exploratory fold on model-evaluations; (3) 400-entry patient lexicon sent for doctor+linguist review (CSV packet delivered); (4) emergency generation rounds PAUSED, the 7 landed pairs measured instead (trace+logits fired). Specialty labels NOT yet approved - stay draft.

decisions_log.decision: Nine consolidation calls executed: inhaler single-telling (widget kept, lede+Fig.1 numbers cut); safety view shrunk (no page-local sign tests; claim-grade stats linked); index model-evaluations retired to teaser; lens story collapsed onto technical (start-here + translation one-liners); wording pages LEFT AS ARE; live specimen is the Fig.3 slot; convergence moved to technical Part 4 fold (methods keeps pointer); definitions canonical on methods step 4 (tier ladder moved there); steering titration STAYS on translation.

Supersedes the earlier 'wording pages left as are': owner chose option B with title 'Wording differences'. word-differences + syntax-differences merged into wording-differences/ (#word, #grammar sections; old URLs are redirect stubs); register ladder moved to the dialect page; plumber pair headlines phrase-dataset. Earlier same evening: 'Syntax Differences' retitled 'Grammar Differences' sitewide (label survives as the #grammar section head). Masthead is 10 links. Dialect page stays standalone.
